/usr/bin/c++  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -g -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  CMakeFiles/ksambasharemodeltest.dir/ksambasharemodeltest_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ksambasharemodeltest.dir/ksambasharemodeltest.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/ksambasharemodeltest  ../../../lib/libkcm_samba_static.a /usr/lib/libQt6Test.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtils.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigWidgets.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsQuick.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6QmlBuiltins.a /usr/lib/libKF6KIOWidgets.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOGui.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libKF6Solid.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6JobWidgets.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Service.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Completion.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6WidgetsAddons.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libKF6ColorScheme.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigGui.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
